response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and D/Node.js engineer with broad product experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale distributed infrastructure/compute platforms. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no evidence of cloud compute platform work, distributed systems at scale, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship focus
Experience with high-throughput services (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, millions of req/s in DLang)
Demonstrated mentoring via workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only a short C/C++ role at NI
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure leadership
No formal technical lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lacks cloud compute platform/distributed infra leadership
Strong engineering craftsmanship and mentoring track record
